positive: A stylized, vibrant celestial portrait featuring a mystical forest creature (like a fox or deer) nestled among glowing bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulas. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, memorable silhouette against a deep indigo and midnight blue background. Use high contrast lighting with golden and teal accents, evoking a dreamlike, enchanted feel. Vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, clean lines, 4k print quality.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, low detail, messy, amateur, text, watermark, signature, gradient mess, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logo, corporate, copyrighted
